videos.headline: Gavin Sawchuk's 21-yard TD sparks Sooners early
videos.description: Gavin Sawchuk scores a 21-yard rushing touchdown to open up the scoring for Oklahoma.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gavin Sawchuk’s 21-yard TD sparks Sooners early) 2024/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hawkins reverses field, then hits Kearney for a 56-yard OU TD
videos.description: Michael Hawkins Jr. delivers a scorching 56-yard pass to Zion Kearney to extend Oklahoma's lead over Navy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hawkins reverses field, then hits Kearney for a 56-yard OU TD) 2024/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alex Tecza's 11-yard rush gets Navy on the board

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alex Tecza’s 11-yard rush gets Navy on the board) 2024/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma executes fake punt with a cheeky jump pass
videos.description: Oklahoma's punter Luke Elzinga tosses a jump pass off the fake punt to get 28 yards and a first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma executes fake punt with a cheeky jump pass) 2024/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Horvath makes Navy history with a 95-yard TD
videos.description: Blake Horvath keeps the ball and goes for a 95-yard rushing touchdown, the longest run in Navy history, to tie the score 14-14.
